  "english": {
    "IsA": [
      "It is a board wargame.",
      "It is a tactical, company-level simulation.",
      "It is a simulation of Operation Avalanche."
    ],
    "HasA": [
      "It has two 22” x 28” hex grid maps.",
      "It has 960 ½” cardboard Counters.",
      "It has a 5½”x 8½” 20-page rulebook.",
      "It has two 8½” x 11” Allied charts.",
      "It has two 8½” x 11” German charts.",
      "It has a 5½” x 8½” sheet of Errata.",
      "It has a 6-sided die.",
      "It has a \"Zip-Lock\" Bag or box to hold components."
    ],
    "HasFeatureOf": [
      "It is characterized by a scale of 1300 yds per hex.",
      "It is characterized by 8 hours per game turn.",
      "It is characterized by ten movement points assigned to every unit.",
      "It is characterized by large numbers of units allowed to be stacked in each hex.",
      "It is characterized by four optional \"what if\" scenarios.",
      "It is characterized by a scale of 1190 m per hex."
    ],
    "UsedFor": [
      "It is used for simulating the nine-day battle for the beachhead at Salerno in September 1943.",
      "It is used for simulating Operation Avalanche.",
      "It is used for tactical/operational wargaming.",
      "It is used for exploring strategic and tactical alternatives."
    ],
    "LocatedIn": [
      "It is located in September 1943."
    ],

      "It was built in 1976."
    ],

      "unknown"
    ],
    "Affects": [
      "unknown"
    ],
    "ConsistsOf": [
      "It consists of armor, armored infantry, motorized infantry, paratroops, glider troops, commandos, infantry, artillery, antiaircraft, antitank, engineers, naval, and information markers."
    ],
    "PartOf": [
      "unknown"
    ],
    "MemberOf": [
      "unknown"
    ],
    "BelongsTo": [
      "It belongs to the category of board wargames."
    ],
    "KnownFor": [
      "It is known for its tactical/operational simulation.",
      "It is known for its simple and ingenious movement system.",
      "It is known for its realistic but tiresome stacking rule.",
      "It is known for its constant tension.",
      "It is known for its rich strategic and tactical alternatives.",
      "It is known for its sophisticated land combat simulation.",
      "It is known for its advanced simulation of special unit functions.",
      "It is known for its numerous special-function units.",
      "It is known for its attractive board.",
      "It is known for its clear rules."
    ],
    "AssociatedWith": [
      "It is associated with the Salerno Landings.",
      "It is associated with Operation Avalanche.",
      "It is associated with the battle for the beachhead at Salerno in September 1943.",
      "It is associated with the Allied invasion of Italy from Sicily in 1943.",
      "It is associated with General Mark Clark's Fifth Army.",
      "It is associated with the British 8th Army.",
      "It is associated with WWII games.",
      "It is associated with Charles S. Roberts Award for \"Best Graphics and Physical Systems of 1976.\""
    ],
    "NamedAfter": [
      "It is named after the Salerno Landings."
    ],
    "OccurredIn": [
      "It occurred in September 1943."
    ],
    "HeldIn": [
      "unknown"
    ],
    "WonBy": [
      "It was won by the Allies if a given number of units can successfully break out of the beachhead area.",
      "It was won by the Allies if they can survive until their reinforcements arrive on September 17.",
      "It was won by the Germans if they can prevent enough Allied units from breaking out of the beachhead.",
      "It was won by the Germans if they can destroy the Allies before September 17."
    ],
    "About": [
      "It is about the nine-day battle for the beachhead at Salerno in September 1943.",
      "It is about Operation Avalanche.",
      "It is about the Allied amphibious landing.",
      "It is about the Allied invasion of Italy from Sicily in 1943.",
      "It is about the attempt to outflank German defenders.",
      "It is about the Allies trying to break out of the beachhead.",
      "It is about the German defenders trying to destroy the landing forces.",
      "It is about the battle between the Allies and German defenders at Salerno."
    ],
    "InfluencedBy": [
      "It was influenced by historical research.",
      "It was influenced by play experience."
    ],
    "Influenced": [
      "It influenced other games with its rules and ideas."

      "それは戦術的、中隊レベルのシミュレーションです。",

      "それはすべてのユニットに割り当てられた10の移動ポイントを特徴としています。",

      "それは1ヘックスあたり1190メートルのスケールを特徴としています。"

    "ConsistsOf": [
      "それは装甲、装甲歩兵、自動車化歩兵、空挺兵、滑空兵、コマンド、歩兵、砲兵、対空砲、対戦車砲、工兵、海軍、および情報マーカーで構成されています。"

      "それはその戦術的/作戦的なシミュレーションで知られています。",
      "それはそのシンプルで独創的な移動システムで知られています。",
      "それはそのリアルだが退屈なスタッキングルールで知られています。",
      "それはその絶え間ない緊張感で知られています。",
      "それはその豊富な戦略的および戦術的な選択肢で知られています。",
      "それはその洗練された陸戦シミュレーションで知られています。",
      "それはその高度な特殊ユニット機能のシミュレーションで知られています。",
      "それはその多数の特殊機能ユニットで知られています。",

    "AssociatedWith": [
      "それはサレルノ上陸作戦と関連があります。",
      "それはアバランチ作戦と関連があります。",
      "それは1943年9月のサレルノでの橋頭堡の戦いと関連があります。",

      "unknown"

      "それは、一定数のユニットが橋頭堡エリアから脱出できれば、連合軍によって勝ちました。",
      "それは、連合軍が9月17日に増援が到着するまで持ちこたえれば、連合軍によって勝ちました。",
      "それは、ドイツ軍が十分な数の連合軍ユニットが橋頭堡から脱出するのを阻止できれば、ドイツ軍によって勝ちました。",
      "それは、ドイツ軍が9月17日までに連合軍を破壊できれば、ドイツ軍によって勝ちました。"
    ],
    "About": [
      "それは1943年9月のサレルノでの9日間の橋頭堡の戦いについてです。",
      "それはアバランチ作戦についてです。",
      "それは連合軍の水陸両用上陸についてです。",
      "それは1943年のシチリアからのイタリアへの連合軍侵攻についてです。",
      "それはドイツ軍の防御陣地を迂回しようとする試みについてです。",
      "それは橋頭堡から脱出しようとする連合軍についてです。",
      "それは上陸部隊を破壊しようとするドイツ軍の防御軍についてです。",
      "それはサレルノでの連合軍とドイツ軍の防御軍との戦いについてです。"
    ],
    "InfluencedBy": [
      "それは歴史研究に影響を受けました。",
      "それはプレイ経験に影響を受けました。"
    ],
    "Influenced": [
      "それはそのルールとアイデアで他のゲームに影響を与えました。"
    ]
  }
}

IsA: It is a tactical, company-level simulation.
It is a simulation of Operation Avalanche.
HasA: It has two 22” x 28” hex grid maps.
It has two 8½” x 11” Allied charts.
It has two 8½” x 11” German charts.
It has a 5½” x 8½” sheet of Errata.
It has a "Zip-Lock" Bag or box to hold components.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by a scale of 1300 yds per hex.
It is characterized by 8 hours per game turn.
It is characterized by ten movement points assigned to every unit.
It is characterized by large numbers of units allowed to be stacked in each hex.
It is characterized by four optional "what if" scenarios.
It is characterized by a scale of 1190 m per hex.
UsedFor: It is used for simulating the nine-day battle for the beachhead at Salerno in September 1943.
It is used for simulating Operation Avalanche.
It is used for tactical/operational wargaming.
It is used for exploring strategic and tactical alternatives.
BuiltBy: It was built by Game Designers' Workshop.
OriginatedIn: It originated in the Allied amphibious landing known as Operation Avalanche.
CreatedBy: It was created by Frank Chadwick.
DevelopedBy: It was developed by Game Designers' Workshop.
WrittenBy: It was written by Frank Chadwick.
ManufacturedBy: It was manufactured by Game Designers' Workshop.
ProducedBy: It was produced by Game Designers' Workshop.
ConsistsOf: It consists of armor, armored infantry, motorized infantry, paratroops, glider troops, commandos, infantry, artillery, antiaircraft, antitank, engineers, naval, and information markers.
BelongsTo: It belongs to the category of board wargames.
KnownFor: It is known for its tactical/operational simulation.
It is known for its simple and ingenious movement system.
It is known for its realistic but tiresome stacking rule.
It is known for its constant tension.
It is known for its rich strategic and tactical alternatives.
It is known for its sophisticated land combat simulation.
It is known for its advanced simulation of special unit functions.
It is known for its numerous special-function units.
It is known for its attractive board.
It is known for its clear rules.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with the Salerno Landings.
It is associated with Operation Avalanche.
It is associated with the battle for the beachhead at Salerno in September 1943.
It is associated with the Allied invasion of Italy from Sicily in 1943.
It is associated with General Mark Clark's Fifth Army.
It is associated with the British 8th Army.
It is associated with WWII games.
It is associated with Charles S. Roberts Award for "Best Graphics and Physical Systems of 1976."
NamedAfter: It is named after the Salerno Landings.
WonBy: It was won by the Allies if a given number of units can successfully break out of the beachhead area.
It was won by the Allies if they can survive until their reinforcements arrive on September 17.
It was won by the Germans if they can prevent enough Allied units from breaking out of the beachhead.
It was won by the Germans if they can destroy the Allies before September 17.
About: It is about the nine-day battle for the beachhead at Salerno in September 1943.
It is about the Allied amphibious landing.
It is about the Allied invasion of Italy from Sicily in 1943.
It is about the attempt to outflank German defenders.
It is about the Allies trying to break out of the beachhead.
It is about the German defenders trying to destroy the landing forces.
It is about the battle between the Allies and German defenders at Salerno.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by historical research.
It was influenced by play experience.
Influenced: It influenced other games with its rules and ideas.
